title: Left Hanging
description: This mod adds a decorative noose in which you can trap entities to decorate your fields and/or house !
body:
## Left Hanging
## 
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f21ee1fa44dcc7ea44c4c2e26820f783d84747c9.png) 

 

### Left Hanging is a decorative mod themed around Halloween
 
 

_**Disclaimer**:_  
 _This mod has its full intensions to be used for decorative purposes._  
 _This mod is themed around HALLOWEEN & HALLOWEEN DECOR._  
 _This mod does not engage politically._

 

Added to the game are :
- A Noose Block
- A Noose Item
- A Noose Mechanic
 
  

Nooses can be crafted with leads:  
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a18be307eaef0cd1aef4b8e616b918b9054e927d.png)

 

- Undead Entities will NOT be damage and can be used as decoration.
- Entities that are not undead will take Damage
- Nooses are traps at their core, and Entities have to walk in to them for them to be caught

 

**Check out the config** to change the damage values and wether or not entities receive damage or not.  
Entities that are affected by the noose are stored in a json file in data/hangman/noose_entities/.
  

Datapacks can be created to add onto the list and allow for modded entities to be strung up too.

 

Fan made resource pack : new noose model >  
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-noose


For Issue and error reporting, please use the issues tab on [github](https://github.com/AbsolemJackdaw/HangMan/issues).
You can always try and contact me trough [Discord](https://discord.gg/8MEdFZh) for suggestions or help with issues
